### Emeriti

::: {.grid}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "David Aldous"
    url    = "https://www.stat.berkeley.edu/~aldous/"
    image  = "/images/david-aldous.jpg"
    affil  = "Professor Emeritus"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Jim Pitman"
    url    = "https://vcresearch.berkeley.edu/faculty/james-pitman"
    image  = "/images/jim-pitman.jpg"
    affil  = "Professor of the Graduate School, Emeritus"
>}}

:::
